rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustee Bank Of America N.A.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 128.7 And 1008(D); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Denied. Although the Court ultimately concluded that the purported "new evidence" was not relevant and did not change the outcome, and although Mr. Sloan's opposition suggests that at least he was motivated at least in part by a desire to reargue the underlying decision or by other improper purposes, there was a sufficient basis for suggesting that there was additional information in support of the moving party's arguments that the Court will not impose sanctions. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must so advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, November 14, 2012.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BARBARA HIRSCHFELDER HANEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of Paul D. Miller To Will Contest And Grounds Of Opposition To Probate Of Purported Will; Notice Of Hearing; Memorandum In Support Of Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: Sustained without leave to amend. David Waterman lacks standing since any interest he might have is derivative of Suzanne Waterman. Suzanne Waterman's contest is time-barred. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (425-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, November 14, 2012.
